text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the autumn Tenno Sho, where
the showdown of the "top three" will take place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the lead-up to the race, the members of BNW
spend their time together like always.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the racecourse is where they'll share their
thoughts and feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin heads to the track with a fire
burning quietly within her.
